Life across our Diocese

More photos from Holy Week events and Easter Services across our diocese.

Enjoy some more photos of our worshipping communities across our diocese marking Holy Week and celebrating Easter Sunday.

arrow_circle_right Find out more information

Upload your photos

We'd love to see your selfies with people at church events like baptisms, weddings and confirmations.

If you have a picture and a link to a story on your social media or website, why not share them with us?

Share your photos with us

Photos from other events

The children and young people of St Edward’s Church, Romford dressed up for their January All Age Service

The Stansted Airport chaplaincy team spread Christmas joy in an airport terminal

St Augustine’s Church, Thorpe Bay held a service at their church for all ages with food, entertainment and speeches

St Mary’s, Prittlewell ‘Make it Mondays’

Margaretting Primary School honoured Remembrance Day at War Memorial

All Saints Church, Maldon pay their respects at a War Memorial next to their church

Contact

The Diocesan Office
53 New Street, Chelmsford, CM1 1AT

email reception@chelmsford.anglican.org
phone 01245 294 400
